tool_calls:
echo 'Only Team A:'
comm -23 /data/team_a.txt /data/team_b.txt
count_a=$(comm -23 /data/team_a.txt /data/team_b.txt | wc -l)
echo "Count: $count_a"
echo
echo 'Only Team B:'
comm -13 /data/team_a.txt /data/team_b.txt
count_b=$(comm -13 /data/team_a.txt /data/team_b.txt | wc -l)
echo "Count: $count_b"
echo
echo 'Both teams:'
comm -12 /data/team_a.txt /data/team_b.txt
count_both=$(comm -12 /data/team_a.txt /data/team_b.txt | wc -l)
echo "Count: $count_both"
